title: ficus aurantiacea var. angustifolia
intro: Ficus aurantiacea var. angustifolia, commonly known as the Chinese banyan or narrow-leaved orange fig, is a variety of plant in the family Moraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ficus aurantiacea var. angustifolia are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Ficus aurantiacea var. angustifolia is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and may also be used in traditional remedies such as ointments and poultices.
